question: Which phrase is displayed at the very top of the screen in the opening frames? A. THE FLORIDA KEYS B. DON'T LET today GET AWAY C. Jamaican Rum Sauce D. BONEFISH GRILL

What color is the long-sleeved shirt worn by the man holding the bent fishing rod?
What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: Text overlays display sauce names and locations before transitioning to a concrete bridge spanning turquoise water. A white motorboat speeds through a channel lined with dense green mangrove trees. A man in a blue shirt reels in a large silver fish with horizontal stripes. Another man holds a rod while a dark fish jumps from blue water. The Bonefish Grill logo remains visible in the bottom right corner throughout.

Describe the sequence of visible events during the fishing trip, noting specific actions and scenes as they appear.
canonical_answer: At 6s, a concrete highway bridge extends across turquoise water; at 8s, a white motorboat speeds through a mangrove channel; at 10s, a man in a blue shirt reels in a bent fishing rod; at 12s, the man holds a large silver fish with horizontal stripes; at 16s, a dark fish jumps out of the blue ocean water.
